hook.say: Zazie Beetz's new movie flopped, then became a hit.
hook.show: Zazie Beetz's new movie flopped, then became a hit.

lines.say: Her 2026 action-horror film They Will Kill You lost money at the box office.
lines.show: Her 2026 action-horror film They Will Kill You lost money at the box office.

lines.say: It grossed just 10.9 million domestically on a 20 million dollar budget.
lines.show: It grossed just $10.9 million domestically on a $20 million dollar budget.

lines.say: But now, per Collider, it's a top three film on HBO Max.
lines.show: But now, per Collider, it's a top three film on HBO Max.

lines.say: The film stars Beetz as Asia, an ex-con searching for her sister.
lines.show: The film stars Beetz as Asia, an ex-con searching for her sister.

lines.say: She infiltrates The Virgil, a NYC high-rise controlled by a deadly cult.
lines.show: She infiltrates The Virgil, a NYC high-rise controlled by a deadly cult.

lines.say: Fans are now discovering its unique blend of action, horror, and dark comedy.
lines.show: Fans are now discovering its unique blend of action, horror, and dark comedy.

onScreenTitle: FLOP TO HIT: ZAZIE BEETZ'S NEW FILM

captions.instagram: Zazie Beetz's new movie "They Will Kill You" flopped at the box office, but it's found new life on HBO Max! 🎬 It went from a $10.9M domestic gross to a top 3 film on streaming. Get the full story on why this action-horror flick is finally getting its due. #ZazieBeetz #TheyWillKillYou #HBOMax #BoxOffice #StreamingSuccess #MovieNews
captions.facebook: Zazie Beetz's "They Will Kill You" struggled in theaters, but it's now a huge hit on HBO Max! This action-horror film is proving that some movies are just meant for streaming. Have you seen it yet?

pinterest.title: Zazie Beetz's 'They Will Kill You' Flops at Box Office, Becomes HBO Max Hit
pinterest.description: Discover how Zazie Beetz's action-horror film 'They Will Kill You' went from a box office disappointment to a top 3 movie on HBO Max. Learn about its unique plot, star performance, and why it's resonating with streaming audiences. Perfect for fans of thrillers and dark comedy.

youtube.title: Zazie Beetz's 'They Will Kill You' Bombs at Box Office, Dominates HBO Max #Shorts
youtube.description: Zazie Beetz's new film 'They Will Kill You' had a rough theatrical run but is now a top performer on HBO Max. Find out why this action-horror flick is a must-see for streaming audiences.

captions.x: Zazie Beetz's 'They Will Kill You' went from box office flop ($10.9M domestic) to a top 3 hit on HBO Max! This action-horror flick is finding its audience on streaming. #TheyWillKillYou

spoken: Zazie Beetz's new movie flopped, then became a hit. Her 2026 action-horror film They Will Kill You lost money at the box office. It grossed just 10.9 million domestically on a 20 million dollar budget. But now, per Collider, it's a top three film on HBO Max. The film stars Beetz as Asia, an ex-con searching for her sister. She infiltrates The Virgil, a NYC high-rise controlled by a deadly cult. Fans are now discovering its unique blend of action, horror, and dark comedy. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
